MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Fred Feller, Esq. (510)548-7474 of BKFC for Defendant/Moving party Estate of James Gause, Deceased, Eleanor Gause

Mr. Fred Feller counsel for the Defendant reports to the Court that the case has settled. He requested that the matter is continued for parties to file a dismissal. The Court grants the request. Defendant Eleanor Gause Motion For Summary Judgment is continued to February 10, 2016. Mr. Feller to give notice to the other side. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
